VORFALE_TWEAKS.sr-portraits.name: SR Portraits
VORFALE_TWEAKS.sr-portraits.hint: Show token portraits next to chat speaker names, with player/GM avatar fallback.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.sr-portraits.description: Shows the speaking token portrait in chat, refreshes visible portraits when token or actor images change, and falls back to player/GM avatars when needed.
